phases_completed: Phase 3: HistoryPane onCollapse prop + collapse button
Phase 5: WorktreeDetailRefactored integration (memo split, useFilePolling gate, ActivityBar wiring)
Phase 6: Deep-link migration (toActivityId + activityId field) + LeftPaneTabSwitcher deletion
Phase 7: Test updates (5 modified, 2 deleted, 4 new)
phases_skipped: Phase 8: Documentation (docs/UI_UX_GUIDE.md / CLAUDE.md / CHANGELOG.md) — out of scope for tdd-impl agent; PM Auto-Dev / human reviewer should append to PR.
Phase 9: Manual QA / dev-server smoke test — out of scope for agent; reserve for UAT.
tests_updated: tests/unit/components/WorktreeDetailRefactored.test.tsx (mock swap: LeftPaneTabSwitcher → ActivityBar + ActivityPane; removed 11 click-Files steps since files is default-active; ignored /tree polling in TC-4)
notes:
Implementation strategy notes:

1. Memo split (Phase 5.4): leftPaneMemo (1 memo, 38 deps) was split into 3 memos:
   - activityBarMemo (deps: activeActivity, handleActivityToggle)
   - activityContent (deps for files/git/notes/schedules/agent/timer activities) + activityPaneMemo (composes ActivityPane around it)
   - historyPaneMemo (HistoryPane wiring with onCollapse)
   Each memo has a 'MAINTENANCE NOTE (Issue #411 R3-007 / Issue #727)' header reminding maintainers to keep deps in sync.

2. WorktreeDesktopLayout API changed completely: old { leftPane, rightPane, leftPaneCollapsed, onToggleLeftPane } removed; new { activityBar, activityPane, historyPane, rightPane, historyPaneCollapsed, onToggleHistoryPane, historyPaneWidth, onHistoryPaneResize } added. Mobile fallback (useIsMobile=true) now composes activity/history into the 2-pane swipe. NO backward-compat shim — caller (WorktreeDetailRefactored) was updated in lockstep.

3. ActivityPane uses 'pre-built content map' pattern (activities: ActivityContentMap) — parent owns all data + callbacks. This keeps ActivityPane thin and avoids prop-drilling. Each activity is wrapped in ErrorBoundary with the expected componentName.

4. useActivityBarState: hydration order = SSR returns DEFAULT_ACTIVITY='files', then useEffect on mount syncs from localStorage. NULL (closed) state is intentionally NOT persisted (last-opened activity stays in storage). Issue body requirement satisfied.

5. useHistoryPaneState: visible + width persisted independently. Width clamped to [MIN_HISTORY_WIDTH=10, MAX_HISTORY_WIDTH=60] on both set and hydration.

6. Deep-link mapping (Phase 6): toActivityId in useWorktreeTabState.ts maps logs→schedules (rename), history/terminal/info→null. activityId added to UseWorktreeTabStateReturn. Existing toLeftPaneTab/toHistorySubTab kept for mobile compat (per invariant #3).

7. Mobile invariants preserved:
   - WorktreeDetailSubComponents.tsx not touched
   - NotesAndLogsPane.tsx not deleted (mobile still depends on it)
   - historySubTab state at WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx still alive (MobileContent consumes it)
   - state.layout.leftPaneTab retained on reducer (mobile compat)

8. WorktreeDesktopLayout.test.tsx: full rewrite from old leftPane/rightPane API to new 4-column API. Added 18 new test cases covering null activity pane, history collapse + expand bar, width props, mobile fallback, accessibility, and resize callback wiring.

9. Two existing tests (TC-4 throttle in WorktreeDetailRefactored.test.tsx + Scenario 5 in issue-266-acceptance.test.tsx) needed a narrow adjustment: now that 'files' is the default-active activity, useFilePolling fires /tree on visibilitychange. The throttle they assert is about lightweight-recovery fetchWorktree/fetchMessages/fetchCurrentOutput, not /tree. We added a filter to ignore /tree calls in the throttle assertion only — no semantic change to what is being tested.

Deferred work (NOT a blocker for PR):
   - Phase 8: docs/UI_UX_GUIDE.md, docs/en/UI_UX_GUIDE.md, CLAUDE.md, CHANGELOG.md updates per work-plan. These are documentation-only updates the PM/release flow can append.
   - Phase 9: manual PC dev-server smoke test (Activity 6-way switching, History collapse/expand, deep-links ?pane=git/notes/logs/files/history). Reserve for UAT.
   - E2E spec re-run (work-plan Phase 7.16): not executed by the TDD agent. Recommend running mobile-cmate-tab.spec.ts, worktree-detail.spec.ts, file-tree-operations.spec.ts, markdown-editor.spec.ts before PR merge to confirm no surprise regressions.

Things that surprised me:
   - PaneResizer does NOT accept data-testid as a prop (no spread); had to identify resizers via getAllByRole('separator').
   - WorktreeDetailRefactored had 38-deps memo (acknowledged in Issue #411 R3-007) — splitting into 3 memos is a meaningful maintainability win.
   - The 'leftPaneTab' state in the reducer is still consumed by mobile via MobileContent props, so it cannot be removed even though PC no longer reads it. Reducer keeps the field; PC simply ignores it.
   - useFilePolling's visibilitychange handler created a subtle test interaction with TC-4 throttle assertions (see note #9).

Ready for human review.
